title: Basic JavaScript String Methods Deep Dive
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript String Methods Deep Dive. Focus on implementing indexOf, lastIndexOf, includes correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript String Methods Deep Dive

title: Advanced JavaScript String Methods Deep Dive Project
description: Build a small application that applies indexOf, lastIndexOf, includes, startsWith, endsWith, slice vs substring vs substr in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript String Methods Deep Dive
description: The following code has bugs related to indexOf, lastIndexOf, includes. Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript String Methods Deep Dive
